title: Oil Gains Amid Further Evidence Of Supply Cuts
section_path: Oil Gains Amid Further Evidence Of Supply Cuts
section_path_text: Oil Gains Amid Further Evidence Of Supply Cuts
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Early losses following weak economic data were reversed as the spectre of an end to the interest rate hike cycle increased. Base metals edged lower following Monday's sell-off as concerns over Chinese demand continue to emanate across the sector. China's Q2 GDP grew 6.3% y/y, posing challenges to growth in the second half of this year.
